message.content:
Explore the hr-core project at D:\project\info-gitlab\hr\hr-core to understand how user account management permissions work. Specifically:

1. Look at the UserController and any admin-related controllers to find endpoints for adding/editing user accounts
2. Look at middleware for permission checks (CheckAdmin, CheckUserPermission, etc.)
3. Look at any permission/role models or tables
4. Look at routes to understand which routes handle user CRUD operations
5. Check if there's a role-based access control system and how permissions are assigned

Be thorough - check models like ResourcesMd, OwnerMd, and any permission-related files.
